title: Master the Internal Buffer State (highWaterMark)
description: Explain the concept of `highWaterMark` and its role in Readable and Writable streams. Master the internal buffer state of Node.js streams to control data flow. Implement strategies to prevent memory exhaustion during heavy I/O operations using `highWaterMark`.
objectives: Explain the concept of `highWaterMark` and its role in Readable and Writable streams.
Master the internal buffer state of Node.js streams to control data flow.
Implement strategies to prevent memory exhaustion during heavy I/O operations using `highWaterMark`.
